description_long: This is a vintage rectangular box of Gold Flake Cigarettes, produced by W.D. & H.O. Wills, Bristol & London. The box is primarily yellow with ornate red and black text and decorative borders, giving it a classic, early 20th-century appearance. The front face displays the brand name, product type, and manufacturer details in a stacked, bordered layout. The sides of the box are labeled with 'Registered Trade Marks' and '10 Cigarettes,' indicating its contents and authenticity. The box appears to be made of thin cardboard or paperboard, with some handwritten text visible on one end. The overall design is flat, compact, and intended for easy carrying in a pocket or bag.
description: A vintage yellow rectangular cardboard box labeled 'Gold Flake Cigarettes' with ornate branding and manufacturer details, designed to hold 10 cigarettes.
description_view_0: Side view showing 'Registered Trade Marks Nos. 12191 & 5908' in black text on a yellow background.
description_view_1: End view showing a plain, unmarked yellow edge with visible box thickness.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying '10 CIGARETTES' in bold black text on yellow.
description_view_3: Front view showing the main label: 'Gold Flake Cigarettes' and manufacturer details, with handwritten 'MODERN NAVAL CRAFT.'
attribute_label_text: GOLD FLAKE CIGARETTES W.D. & H.O. WILLS GOLD FLAKE HONEY DEW W.D. & H.O. WILLS BRISTOL & LONDON Registered Trade Marks Nos. 12191 & 5908. 10 CIGARETTES MODERN NAVAL CRAFT.
